prompt: In image 1, replace the “Shop Now” button with the “BUY NOW” button from image 3, keeping its position and scaling it to fit. Add the red “LOGIN” button from image 2 to the top-right corner of the navigation bar, aligned right. Insert the telephone icon from image 4 below the “Why Shop With Us” heading, centered and scaled to match text height. Leave all other elements untouched.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1 as follows:
1.  Replace the red 'Shop Now' button with the 'BUY NOW' button from image 3, maintaining its exact position and scaling it to fit the original button's dimensions.
2.  Add the red 'LOGIN' button from image 2 to the top-right corner of image 1's navigation bar, aligning it to the right of the existing navigation elements.
3.  Insert the telephone icon from image 4 below the 'Why Shop With Us' heading in image 1. Center the icon horizontally beneath the heading and scale its height to match the heading's text height.
Leave all other elements in image 1 untouched.
objects: Red 'LOGIN' button in top-right navigation bar
Woman in pink hoodie with yellow sunglasses
'BUY NOW' button with shopping cart icon
Telephone icon below "Why Shop With Us"
